MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., is present. Represented by Elise Westbrook.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tim Alexander and Barbara Palmer are present.
Attorney Peter Chess representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-21-2012 is vacated.
